owner: validation owner + system owner + quality owner
gate: record authenticity/integrity/confidentiality/non-repudiation controls documented before signature-bearing workflow graduation
evidence: source map standard + HESEM planning matrix
signature_meaning: Specific to command; never generic approval.
stop_rule: stop if record can be changed without independent audit trail or cannot be retrieved throughout retention

gate: every create/modify/delete/state transition has immutable audit event and original values not obscured

test_or_review_method: audit event immutability and timeline reconstruction review
signature_meaning: Specific to command; never generic approval.
stop_rule: stop if audit log is user-editable text or original value can be hidden

stop_rule: stop if stale state or unauthorized actor can mutate record

gate: signature includes printed name, date/time, and explicit meaning in human-readable record
